summary: Comprehensive testing of YachtAssist marketplace MVP completed successfully. All major functionality verified including login flows, dashboard views, ticket management, checklist compliance, and mobile responsiveness.

flaky_endpoints.issue: Returns 404 when trying to reassign already assigned ticket
flaky_endpoints.impact: Minor - expected behavior for already assigned tickets

passed_tests: Owner login with correct redirect to dashboard showing 'Ciao Chrystian'
Technician login with correct redirect to dashboard showing 'Ciao Enrico'
Owner dashboard displays yacht 'Suerte - Sanlorenzo 50' with 100% compliance after ticket closure
All 3 stat cards present: Ticket aperti (0), Interventi in corso (0), Stagione 2025
Checklist page shows 4/6 voci conformi (67%), correct status badges (CONFORME/MANCANTE/SCADUTI)
3 'NUOVO 2025' badges correctly displayed on items 1, 3, and 6
Create ticket page shows YA-2025-0847 with URGENZA ALTA badge
2 work items displayed: Fornitura zattera ISO 9650-1, Sostituzione razzi paracadute × 2
Price range €180-€380 correctly shown
3 technicians available with Enrico Gibaldi first (Eco Certified, 4.9 rating, Livorno 8km)
Ticket detail shows complete status timeline: Aperto→Assegnato→Accettato→Eseguito→Chiuso
Enrico Gibaldi info with avatar, Eco Certified badge, and 4.9 rating displayed
Appointment details: 'Sab 5 apr · 09:30 · Marina di Pisa pontile B'
Financial breakdown: €280 intervention, €42 commission, €238 technician payment
Documents section shows Fattura.pdf, Foto_zattera.jpg, Cert_omologazione.pdf after closure
Technician dashboard shows 1 assigned ticket, €0 pending, €238 total earnings
Complete ticket workflow from creation to closure updates compliance score from 67% to 100%
Mobile responsiveness verified on 390x844 viewport for all pages
Italian language used throughout: Benvenuto, Ciao, Conformità, etc.
Visual design with Navy #0A2342 and teal #1D9E75 colors, anchor logo
Professional clean UI suitable for investor demo
